approval.note: Repository changes require diff-bound review and green CI before merge.

title: SW-015 — Add safe automated maintenance
goal: Detect source changes and propose managed-region updates, stale statements, open decisions, focus and timeline views without mutating human regions.

acceptance.assertion: Automation emits reviewable proposals rather than direct provider writes.
Human and cooperative regions are excluded from automatic replacement.
Stale and contradictory source facts are visible with evidence.
Accepted maintenance runs produce source/apply/postflight receipts.
